infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Cadence Optimizer uses your location for terrain detection and GPS-based cadence adjustments during runs.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Cadence Optimizer uses your location for terrain detection and GPS-based cadence adjustments during runs.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Cadence Optimizer needs audio access for metronome functionality and voice coaching.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Cadence Optimizer uses motion sensors to detect running cadence and provide real-time feedback.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Cadence Optimizer can integrate with HealthKit to provide comprehensive running analytics.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Cadence Optimizer can save your running data to HealthKit for comprehensive health tracking.
